chapter_goal: Track tau through segment construction, pentagon geometry, spirals, Fibonacci approximants, and phyllotactic lattices.

library_routing.Matplotlib: durable 2D construction, pentagon, spiral, convergence, and lattice diagrams
library_routing.NumPy/Pandas: numeric sequences, residuals, CSV tables, and artifact manifests
library_routing.Plotly: standalone HTML inspection for spiral and divergence-parameter lab
library_routing.SciPy Voronoi: Dirichlet-cell context for the unrolled phyllotaxis lattice

visual_sequence.check: larger/smaller and whole/larger both equal tau
diagonal/side and diagonal split ratios equal tau
successive polar points rotate pi/2 and rescale by tau
recurrences, Lucas identities, Cassini/Simson, Binet formula
Fibonacci steps are best angular returns
nearest offsets for standard h are 5, 8, 13
